importId.description: An identifier for a unique import job. Use it when you call the StartImport operation.

uploadUrl.description: A pre-signed S3 write URL. Upload the zip archive file that contains the definition of your bot or bot locale.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot associated with this custom vocabulary.

botVersion.description: The identifier of the version of the bot associated with this custom vocabulary.

localeId.description: The identifier of the language and locale where this custom vocabulary is used. The string must match one of the supported locales. For more information, see Supported Languages .

errors.description: A list of custom vocabulary items that failed to create during the operation. The reason for the error is contained within each error object.

resources.description: A list of custom vocabulary items that were successfully created during the operation.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot associated with this custom vocabulary.

botVersion.description: The identifier of the version of the bot associated with this custom vocabulary.

localeId.description: The identifier of the language and locale where this custom vocabulary is used. The string must match one of the supported locales. For more information, see Supported languages (https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lexv2/latest/dg/how-languages.html).

errors.description: A list of custom vocabulary items that failed to delete during the operation. The reason for the error is contained within each error object.

resources.description: A list of custom vocabulary items that were successfully deleted during the operation.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot associated with this custom vocabulary.

botVersion.description: The identifier of the version of the bot associated with this custom vocabulary.

localeId.description: The identifier of the language and locale where this custom vocabulary is used. The string must match one of the supported locales. For more information, see Supported Languages .

errors.description: A list of custom vocabulary items that failed to update during the operation. The reason for the error is contained within each error object.

resources.description: A list of custom vocabulary items that were successfully updated during the operation.

botId.description: The identifier of the specified bot.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot that was built. This is only the draft version of the bot.

localeId.description: The language and locale specified of where the bot can be used.

botLocaleStatus.description: The bot's build status. When the status is ReadyExpressTesting you can test the bot using the utterances defined for the intents and slot types. When the status is Built, the bot is ready for use and can be tested using any utterance.

lastBuildSubmittedDateTime.description: A timestamp indicating the date and time that the bot was last built for this locale.

botId.description: A unique identifier for a particular bot. You use this to identify the bot when you call other Amazon Lex API operations.

roleArn.description: The IAM role specified for the bot.

dataPrivacy.description: The data privacy settings specified for the bot.

idleSessionTTLInSeconds.description: The session idle time specified for the bot.

botStatus.description: Shows the current status of the bot. The bot is first in the Creating status. Once the bot is read for use, it changes to the Available status. After the bot is created, you can use the DRAFT version of the bot.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp indicating the date and time that the bot was created.

botTags.description: A list of tags associated with the bot.

testBotAliasTags.description: A list of tags associated with the test alias for the bot.

botType.description: The type of a bot that was created.

botMembers.description: The list of bots in a network that was created.

errorLogSettings.description: Specifies configuration settings for delivering error logs to Cloudwatch Logs in an Amazon Lex bot response.

botAliasId.description: The unique identifier of the bot alias.

botAliasName.description: The name specified for the bot alias.

description.description: The description specified for the bot alias.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot associated with this alias.

conversationLogSettings.description: The conversation log settings specified for the alias.

sentimentAnalysisSettings.description: Determines whether Amazon Lex will use Amazon Comprehend to detect the sentiment of user utterances.

botAliasStatus.description: The current status of the alias. The alias is first put into the Creating state. When the alias is ready to be used, it is put into the Available state. You can use the DescribeBotAlias operation to get the current state of an alias.

botId.description: The unique identifier of the bot that this alias applies to.

creationDateTime.description: A Unix timestamp indicating the date and time that the bot alias was created.

tags.description: A list of tags associated with the bot alias.

botId.description: The specified bot identifier.

botVersion.description: The specified bot version.

description.description: The specified description of the bot locale.

nluIntentConfidenceThreshold.description: The specified confidence threshold for inserting the AMAZON.FallbackIntent and AMAZON.KendraSearchIntent intents.

voiceSettings.description: The Amazon Polly voice ID that Amazon Lex uses for voice interaction with the user.

botLocaleStatus.description:
The status of the bot.

When the status is Creating the bot locale is being configured. When the status is Building Amazon Lex is building the bot for testing and use.

If the status of the bot is ReadyExpressTesting, you can test the bot using the exact utterances specified in the bots' intents. When the bot is ready for full testing or to run, the status is Built.

If there was a problem with building the bot, the status is Failed. If the bot was saved but not built, the status is NotBuilt.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp specifying the date and time that the bot locale was created.

generativeAISettings.description: Contains specifications about the generative AI capabilities from Amazon Bedrock that you can turn on for your bot.

speechDetectionSensitivity.description: The sensitivity level for voice activity detection (VAD) that was specified for the bot locale.

botId.description: The unique bot ID of the replicated bot generated.

replicaRegion.description: The region of the replicated bot generated.

sourceRegion.description: The source region for the source bot used for the replicated bot generated.

creationDateTime.description: The creation date and time of the replicated bot generated.

botReplicaStatus.description: The operational status of the replicated bot generated.

botId.description: The bot identifier specified in the request.

description.description: The description of the version specified in the request.

botVersion.description: The version number assigned to the version.

botVersionLocaleSpecification.description: The source versions used for each locale in the new version.

botStatus.description: When you send a request to create or update a bot, Amazon Lex sets the status response element to Creating. After Amazon Lex builds the bot, it sets status to Available. If Amazon Lex can't build the bot, it sets status to Failed.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the version was created.

exportId.description: An identifier for a specific request to create an export.

resourceSpecification.description: A description of the type of resource that was exported, either a bot or a bot locale.

fileFormat.description: The file format used for the bot or bot locale definition files.

exportStatus.description: The status of the export. When the status is Completed, you can use the DescribeExport operation to get the pre-signed S3 URL link to your exported bot or bot locale.

creationDateTime.description: The date and time that the request to export a bot was created.

intentDisplayName.description: The display name specified for the intent.

parentIntentSignature.description: The signature of the parent intent specified for the intent.

sampleUtterances.description: The sample utterances specified for the intent.

dialogCodeHook.description: The dialog Lambda function specified for the intent.

fulfillmentCodeHook.description: The fulfillment Lambda function specified for the intent.

intentConfirmationSetting.description: The confirmation setting specified for the intent.

intentClosingSetting.description: The closing setting specified for the intent.

inputContexts.description: The list of input contexts specified for the intent.

outputContexts.description: The list of output contexts specified for the intent.

kendraConfiguration.description: Configuration for searching a Amazon Kendra index specified for the intent.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot associated with the intent.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot associated with the intent.

localeId.description: The locale that the intent is specified to use.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the intent was created.

initialResponseSetting.description: Configuration settings for the response that is sent to the user at the beginning of a conversation, before eliciting slot values.

qnAIntentConfiguration.description: Details about the the configuration of the built-in Amazon.QnAIntent.

qInConnectIntentConfiguration.description: Qinconnect intent configuration details for the create intent response.

resourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the bot or bot alias that the resource policy was attached to.

revisionId.description: The current revision of the resource policy. Use the revision ID to make sure that you are updating the most current version of a resource policy when you add a policy statement to a resource, delete a resource, or update a resource.

resourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the bot or bot alias that the resource policy is attached to.

revisionId.description: The current revision of the resource policy. Use the revision ID to make sure that you are updating the most current version of a resource policy when you add a policy statement to a resource, delete a resource, or update a resource.

slotId.description: The unique identifier associated with the slot. Use this to identify the slot when you update or delete it.

slotTypeId.description: The unique identifier of the slot type associated with this slot.

valueElicitationSetting.description: The value elicitation settings specified for the slot.

obfuscationSetting.description: Indicates whether the slot is configured to obfuscate values in Amazon CloudWatch logs.

botId.description: The unique identifier of the bot associated with the slot.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot associated with the slot.

localeId.description: The language and local specified for the slot.

intentId.description: The unique identifier of the intent associated with the slot.

creationDateTime.description: The timestamp of the date and time that the slot was created.

multipleValuesSetting.description: Indicates whether the slot returns multiple values in one response.

subSlotSetting.description: Specifications for the constituent sub slots and the expression for the composite slot.

slotTypeId.description: The unique identifier assigned to the slot type. Use this to identify the slot type in the UpdateSlotType and DeleteSlotType operations.

slotTypeName.description: The name specified for the slot type.

description.description: The description specified for the slot type.

slotTypeValues.description: The list of values that the slot type can assume.

valueSelectionSetting.description: The strategy that Amazon Lex uses to select a value from the list of possible values.

parentSlotTypeSignature.description: The signature of the base slot type specified for the slot type.

botId.description: The identifier for the bot associated with the slot type.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot associated with the slot type.

localeId.description: The specified language and local specified for the slot type.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the slot type was created.

externalSourceSetting.description: The type of external information used to create the slot type.

testSetDiscrepancyReportId.description: The unique identifier of the test set discrepancy report to describe.

creationDateTime.description: The creation date and time for the test set discrepancy report.

testSetId.description: The test set Id for the test set discrepancy report.

target.description: The target bot for the test set discrepancy report.

botId.description: The unique identifier of the bot that Amazon Lex is deleting.

botStatus.description: The current status of the bot. The status is Deleting while the bot and its associated resources are being deleted.

botAliasId.description: The unique identifier of the bot alias to delete.

botId.description: The unique identifier of the bot that contains the alias to delete.

botAliasStatus.description: The current status of the alias. The status is Deleting while the alias is in the process of being deleted. Once the alias is deleted, it will no longer appear in the list of aliases returned by the ListBotAliases operation.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot that contained the deleted locale.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot that contained the deleted locale.

localeId.description: The language and locale of the deleted locale.

botLocaleStatus.description: The status of deleting the bot locale. The locale first enters the Deleting status. Once the locale is deleted it no longer appears in the list of locales for the bot.

botId.description: The unique bot ID of the replicated bot generated.

replicaRegion.description: The region of the replicated bot generated.

botReplicaStatus.description: The operational status of the replicated bot generated.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot that is being deleted.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot that is being deleted.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot that the custom vocabulary was removed from.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot that the custom vocabulary was removed from.

localeId.description: The locale identifier for the locale that the custom vocabulary was removed from.

customVocabularyStatus.description: The status of removing the custom vocabulary.

exportId.description: The unique identifier of the deleted export.

exportStatus.description: The current status of the deletion. When the deletion is complete, the export will no longer be returned by the ListExports operation and calls to the DescribeExport operation with the export identifier will fail.

importId.description: The unique identifier of the deleted import.

importStatus.description: The current status of the deletion. When the deletion is complete, the import will no longer be returned by the ListImports operation and calls to the DescribeImport operation with the import identifier will fail.

resourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the bot or bot alias that the resource policy was deleted from.

revisionId.description: The current revision of the resource policy. Use the revision ID to make sure that you are updating the most current version of a resource policy when you add a policy statement to a resource, delete a resource, or update a resource.

resourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the bot or bot alias that the resource policy statement was removed from.

revisionId.description: The current revision of the resource policy. Use the revision ID to make sure that you are updating the most current version of a resource policy when you add a policy statement to a resource, delete a resource, or update a resource.

botId.description: The unique bot Id for the bot which received the response.

botVersion.description: The unique bot version for the bot which received the response.

localeId.description: The unique locale Id for the bot which received the response.

intentId.description: The unique intent Id for the bot which received the response.

sampleUtterances.description: The sample utterances for the bot which received the response.

botId.description: The unique identifier of the bot containing the bot recommendation.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot containing the bot recommendation.

localeId.description: The identifier of the language and locale of the bot recommendation to start. The string must match one of the supported locales. For more information, see Supported languages

botRecommendationStatus.description:
The status of the bot recommendation.

If the status is Failed, then the reasons for the failure are listed in the failureReasons field.

botRecommendationId.description: The identifier of the bot recommendation that you have created.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the bot recommendation was created.

transcriptSourceSetting.description: The object representing the Amazon S3 bucket containing the transcript, as well as the associated metadata.

encryptionSetting.description: The object representing the passwords that were used to encrypt the data related to the bot recommendation results, as well as the KMS key ARN used to encrypt the associated metadata.

generationInputPrompt.description: The prompt that was used generate intents and slot types for the bot locale.

generationId.description: The unique identifier of the generation request.

botId.description: The unique identifier of the bot for which the generation request was made.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot for which the generation request was made.

localeId.description: The locale of the bot for which the generation request was made.

creationDateTime.description: The date and time at which the generation request was made.

resourceSpecification.description: The parameters used when importing the resource.

mergeStrategy.description: The strategy used when there was a name conflict between the imported resource and an existing resource. When the merge strategy is FailOnConflict existing resources are not overwritten and the import fails.

importStatus.description: The current status of the import. When the status is Complete the bot, bot alias, or custom vocabulary is ready to use.

creationDateTime.description: The date and time that the import request was created.

testExecutionId.description: The unique identifier of the test set execution.

creationDateTime.description: The creation date and time for the test set execution.

testSetId.description: The test set Id for the test set execution.

target.description: The target bot for the test set execution.

apiMode.description: Indicates whether we use streaming or non-streaming APIs for the test set execution. For streaming, StartConversation Amazon Lex Runtime API is used. Whereas for non-streaming, RecognizeUtterance and RecognizeText Amazon Lex Runtime API are used.

testExecutionModality.description: Indicates whether audio or text is used.

testSetGenerationId.description: The unique identifier of the test set generation to describe.

creationDateTime.description: The creation date and time for the test set generation.

testSetGenerationStatus.description: The status for the test set generation.

testSetName.description: The test set name used for the test set generation.

description.description: The description used for the test set generation.

storageLocation.description: The Amazon S3 storage location for the test set generation.

generationDataSource.description: The data source for the test set generation.

roleArn.description: The roleARN used for any operation in the test set to access resources in the Amazon Web Services account.

testSetTags.description: A list of tags that was used for the test set that is being generated.

botId.description: The unique identifier of the bot containing the bot recommendation that is being stopped.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot containing the recommendation that is being stopped.

localeId.description: The identifier of the language and locale of the bot response to stop. The string must match one of the supported locales. For more information, see Supported languages

botRecommendationStatus.description: The status of the bot recommendation. If the status is Failed, then the reasons for the failure are listed in the failureReasons field.

botRecommendationId.description: The unique identifier of the bot recommendation that is being stopped.

botId.description: The unique identifier of the bot that was updated.

botName.description: The name of the bot after the update.

description.description: The description of the bot after the update.

roleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role used by the bot after the update.

dataPrivacy.description: The data privacy settings for the bot after the update.

idleSessionTTLInSeconds.description: The session timeout, in seconds, for the bot after the update.

botStatus.description: Shows the current status of the bot. The bot is first in the Creating status. Once the bot is read for use, it changes to the Available status. After the bot is created, you can use the DRAFT version of the bot.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the bot was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the bot was last updated.

botType.description: The type of the bot that was updated.

botMembers.description: The list of bot members in the network that was updated.

errorLogSettings.description: Settings for managing error logs within the response of an update bot operation.

botAliasId.description: The identifier of the updated bot alias.

botAliasName.description: The updated name of the bot alias.

description.description: The updated description of the bot alias.

botVersion.description: The updated version of the bot that the alias points to.

botAliasLocaleSettings.description: The updated Lambda functions to use in each locale for the bot alias.

conversationLogSettings.description: The updated settings for storing conversation logs in Amazon CloudWatch Logs and Amazon S3 buckets.

sentimentAnalysisSettings.description: Determines whether Amazon Lex will use Amazon Comprehend to detect the sentiment of user utterances.

botAliasStatus.description: The current status of the bot alias. When the status is Available the alias is ready for use.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot with the updated alias.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the bot was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the bot was last updated.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot that contains the updated locale.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot that contains the updated locale.

localeId.description: The language and locale of the updated bot locale.

localeName.description: The updated locale name for the locale.

nluIntentConfidenceThreshold.description: The updated confidence threshold for inserting the AMAZON.FallbackIntent and AMAZON.KendraSearchIntent intents in the list of possible intents for an utterance.

voiceSettings.description: The updated Amazon Polly voice to use for voice interaction with the user.

botLocaleStatus.description: The current status of the locale. When the bot status is Built the locale is ready for use.

failureReasons.description: If the botLocaleStatus is Failed, the failureReasons field lists the errors that occurred while building the bot.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the locale was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the locale was last updated.

recommendedActions.description: Recommended actions to take to resolve an error in the failureReasons field.

generativeAISettings.description: Contains settings for generative AI features powered by Amazon Bedrock for your bot locale.

speechDetectionSensitivity.description: The updated sensitivity level for voice activity detection (VAD) in the bot locale.

botId.description: The unique identifier of the bot containing the bot recommendation that has been updated.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot containing the bot recommendation that has been updated.

localeId.description: The identifier of the language and locale of the bot recommendation to update. The string must match one of the supported locales. For more information, see Supported languages

botRecommendationStatus.description:
The status of the bot recommendation.

If the status is Failed, then the reasons for the failure are listed in the failureReasons field.

botRecommendationId.description: The unique identifier of the bot recommendation to be updated.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the bot recommendation was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the bot recommendation was last updated.

transcriptSourceSetting.description: The object representing the Amazon S3 bucket containing the transcript, as well as the associated metadata.

encryptionSetting.description: The object representing the passwords that were used to encrypt the data related to the bot recommendation results, as well as the KMS key ARN used to encrypt the associated metadata.

exportId.description: The unique identifier Amazon Lex assigned to the export.

resourceSpecification.description: A description of the type of resource that was exported, either a bot or a bot locale.

fileFormat.description: The file format used for the files that define the resource. The TSV format is required to export a custom vocabulary only; otherwise use LexJson format.

exportStatus.description: The status of the export. When the status is Completed the export archive is available for download.

creationDateTime.description: The date and time that the export was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time that the export was last updated.

intentId.description: The identifier of the intent that was updated.

intentDisplayName.description: The updated display name of the intent.

parentIntentSignature.description: The updated built-in intent that is the parent of this intent.

sampleUtterances.description: The updated list of sample utterances for the intent.

dialogCodeHook.description: The updated Lambda function called during each turn of the conversation with the user.

fulfillmentCodeHook.description: The updated Lambda function called when the intent is ready for fulfillment.

slotPriorities.description: The updated list of slots and their priorities that are elicited from the user for the intent.

intentConfirmationSetting.description: The updated prompts that Amazon Lex sends to the user to confirm the completion of an intent.

intentClosingSetting.description: The updated response that Amazon Lex sends the user when the intent is closed.

inputContexts.description: The updated list of contexts that must be active for the intent to be considered by Amazon Lex.

outputContexts.description: The updated list of contexts that Amazon Lex activates when the intent is fulfilled.

kendraConfiguration.description: The updated configuration for connecting to an Amazon Kendra index with the AMAZON.KendraSearchIntent intent.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot that contains the intent.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot that contains the intent. Will always be DRAFT.

localeId.description: The updated language and locale of the intent.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of when the intent was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: A timestamp of the last time that the intent was modified.

initialResponseSetting.description: Configuration settings for a response sent to the user before Amazon Lex starts eliciting slots.

qnAIntentConfiguration.description: Details about the configuration of the built-in Amazon.QnAIntent.

qInConnectIntentConfiguration.description: Qinconnect intent configuration details for the update intent response.

resourceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the bot or bot alias that the resource policy is attached to.

revisionId.description: The current revision of the resource policy. Use the revision ID to make sure that you are updating the most current version of a resource policy when you add a policy statement to a resource, delete a resource, or update a resource.

slotId.description: The unique identifier of the slot that was updated.

slotTypeId.description: The updated identifier of the slot type that provides values for the slot.

valueElicitationSetting.description: The updated prompts that Amazon Lex sends to the user to elicit a response that provides a value for the slot.

obfuscationSetting.description: The updated setting that determines whether the slot value is obfuscated in the Amazon CloudWatch logs.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot that contains the slot.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot that contains the slot. Will always be DRAFT.

creationDateTime.description: The timestamp of the date and time that the slot was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: The timestamp of the date and time that the slot was last updated.

multipleValuesSetting.description: Indicates whether the slot accepts multiple values in one response.

subSlotSetting.description: Specifications for the constituent sub slots and the expression for the composite slot.

slotTypeId.description: The unique identifier of the updated slot type.

slotTypeName.description: The updated name of the slot type.

description.description: The updated description of the slot type.

slotTypeValues.description: The updated values that the slot type provides.

valueSelectionSetting.description: The updated strategy that Amazon Lex uses to determine which value to select from the slot type.

parentSlotTypeSignature.description: The updated signature of the built-in slot type that is the parent of this slot type.

botId.description: The identifier of the bot that contains the slot type.

botVersion.description: The version of the bot that contains the slot type. This is always DRAFT.

localeId.description: The language and locale of the updated slot type.

creationDateTime.description: The timestamp of the date and time that the slot type was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time that the slot type was last updated.

externalSourceSetting.description: Provides information about the external source of the slot type's definition.

testSetId.description: The test set Id for which update test operation to be performed.

testSetName.description: The test set name for the updated test set.

description.description: The test set description for the updated test set.

modality.description: Indicates whether audio or text is used for the updated test set.

status.description: The status for the updated test set.

roleArn.description: The roleARN used for any operation in the test set to access resources in the Amazon Web Services account.

numTurns.description: The number of conversation turns from the updated test set.

storageLocation.description: The Amazon S3 storage location for the updated test set.

creationDateTime.description: The creation date and time for the updated test set.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: The date and time of the last update for the updated test set.
